focus_points.label: Path to director role readiness
focus_points.reason: Notes mention readiness to move into a director role. Worth exploring what skills or experiences she feels are still needed to fully step into that position.

focus_points.label: Delegation as a director-level skill
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard growth edge at this level; worth a pulse-check on how she's preparing to delegate effectively as she steps up.

focus_points.label: Building director-level stakeholder relationships
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — moving to a director role involves managing more complex stakeholder relationships; exploring her approach could be valuable.

focus_points.label: Strategic impact at a director level
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — at this point in her career, understanding how she plans to amplify her impact as a director is vital.

focus_points.label: Clarity on director role expectations
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — common gap when transitioning roles; ensuring she understands what 'good' looks like for a director is crucial.
